description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service. Define a single stage named build and a job called build that runs in this stage. The job executes the following script commands in order: export IMAGE_TAG=$(echo -en $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME | tr -c '[:alnum:]_.-' '-'), export BUILDCONTAINER="buildresult_$IMAGE_TAG""$RANDOM", docker build --pull -t "build$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG" ., docker create --name $BUILDCONTAINER "build$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG", docker cp "$BUILDCONTAINER":/sshfs-provisioner ./, docker cp "$BUILDCONTAINER":/symlinkwrapper ./slw, docker rm "$BUILDCONTAINER", docker build -t "fnordian/kubernetes-sshfs-provisioner:$IMAGE_TAG" -f light.Dockerfile ., docker login -u "$DOCKERHUB_USER" -p "$DOCKERHUB_PASSWORD", docker push "fnordian/kubernetes-sshfs-provisioner:$IMAGE_TAG". No caches, artifacts, or rules are defined.
